setup.content:
1. Place the **Starting card** (marked X) in the center of the play area.
2. Sort cards by color. Each player takes one **18-card color deck** and shuffles it.
3. Hold your deck as a stack — **never fan or browse**. You may only access the **top and bottom** cards.
4. First player: whoever has the **lowest value** on either outermost card. Play proceeds clockwise.

**Boundary:** Table edge is the limit — cards cannot go beyond it.

turn.content:
On your turn, choose one of your two accessible cards (**top or bottom** of your deck) and play it.

### Before Placing
You may **flip and/or rotate** the card freely.

### Legal Play
Your card must connect to **exactly one** existing card by covering one of its shapes.

### Cannot Play Legally?
Play one card **face-up anywhere** on the table that does **not touch** any existing card.

### Illegal Placement
If discovered, remove the card — unless another card was already placed on top of it.

placement-rules.content:
### Shape Matching
- Your card must **share matching shapes** on the touching edge with a neighbor.
- When shapes align correctly, the **outline of the underlying card appears continuous** — this confirms legal placement.
- **Hollow shapes** and **dot-filled shapes** are interchangeable for matching.

### Key Constraints
- A card may connect to **only one** existing card (no bridging two cards).
- Plan placement to **maximize your visible dots** while **covering opponents' dots**.
- You cannot play on a card of **your own color** (Speed Mode only).

**Strategy:** Rotate cards to find the angle that covers enemy dots while exposing yours.

scoring.content:
When all players have played all 18 cards, count **visible dots of your color** on the table.

**Highest dot total wins.** Ties = shared victory.

### Variants

**Team Mode**
Play in teams (teammates sit across). Each uses a **9-card half-deck**.

**Speed Mode (No Turns)**
Countdown 3-2-1-Go! All play simultaneously as fast as possible. Cannot play on your own color. Game ends when any player plays their last card.

**Three-Round Mode**
Separate cards by suit symbol. Play 3 rounds with different suits. **Total dots across all rounds** determines the winner.
